MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC's Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.
